releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Suggestions heard and fixes approved! Here is version 1.1(.0) for you guys.

**Changelog:**
- Add README details on status of plugin such as:
	- What systems it has been tested on
 	- What features are coming soon
 	- How to report bugs or suggest new features
 - Make new tab appear with sheet that was just created
 - Store new sheets in a default folder

- Our first official release!
- Two character sheets to choose from: A standard sheet and a D&D sheet!
- Modal system for future sheet additions
